proposal: Central Square lacks brand alignment. Sell naming rights to a biscuit conglomerate. Maps will update for a fee.

options.label: Sell the naming rights
options.result_text: Crispy Square opens. Tourists ask for the old name. Guides charge for both.

options.label: Lease for one festival
options.result_text: Banners hang for seven days. Glue remains for months.

options.label: Keep the civic name
options.result_text: Square stays public. Profit files a polite disappointment memo.

authoring.visual_hook: biscuit logos over civic square plaques
authoring.writer_notes: Non-privatization: sponsorship/naming only. Soft corporate identity flag.

proposal: Public services feel free. Offer Bronze, Silver, and Platinum citizen tiers. Support tickets optional.

options.label: Launch the tiers
options.result_text: Platinum citizens skip lines. Bronze citizens invent new lines.

options.label: Pilot Bronze only
options.result_text: Bronze includes 'maybe a stamp.' Support is a chalkboard.

options.label: Keep services public
options.result_text: Services remain free. Profit recalculates the country's valuation.

authoring.visual_hook: tier kiosks with bronze silver platinum badges
authoring.writer_notes: Soft unlock for working_palace_tours in 2B-5B via palace_tour_unlocked.

proposal: The state biscuit works still bake for glory. Float them on the exchange. Crumbs for stakeholders.

options.label: Full public offering
options.result_text: Shares rise. Workers get prospectus hats. Flour becomes confidential.

options.label: Sell a minority stake
options.result_text: State keeps the recipe. Investors keep the profits. Oven shared awkwardly.

options.label: Keep biscuits public
options.result_text: Bakers cheer. Profit drafts a 'missed opportunity' newsletter.

authoring.visual_hook: biscuit share banners over the bakery chimney
authoring.writer_notes: State-company sale path; three meaningful options.

proposal: Sidewalks are congested. Franchise express lanes for paying pedestrians. Slow lane remains charitable.

options.label: Franchise express lanes
options.result_text: Fast walkers blur past. Slow lane invents new vocabulary for elbows.

options.label: Peak hours only
options.result_text: Noon costs a coin. Midnight is free and lonely.

options.label: Keep sidewalks equal
options.result_text: Everyone walks together. Profit times their inefficiency.

authoring.visual_hook: painted express sidewalk with turnstile ankles
authoring.writer_notes: Private infrastructure; hits order beyond obvious treasury joke.

proposal: Cabinet briefing lists nine urgencies and one stapler emergency. Attend, audit, or delegate Form 0.

options.label: Attend and audit
options.result_text: Three crises shrink. Two grow paperwork. The stapler is inventoried.

options.label: Send a delegate
options.result_text: Delegate drinks coffee. Minutes arrive next week with coffee rings.

options.label: Skip until stamped
options.result_text: Agenda freezes. Clerk Zero marks the day Unofficial.

authoring.visual_hook: towering briefing stack with stapler on top
authoring.writer_notes: REWRITE of thin generic fill; useful audit path at real cost.

proposal: Citizens complain without permits. Open an office: Form C-1 before any grievance may be spoken.

options.label: Open the permit office
options.result_text: Complaints queue for permission to exist. Silence becomes pending.

options.label: Verbal complaints allowed
options.result_text: Spoken gripes accepted Tuesdays. Wednesdays require ink.

options.label: Allow free complaints
options.result_text: Grievances flow freely. Filing cabinets look lonely.

authoring.visual_hook: desk where people request permission to complain
authoring.writer_notes: Soft unlock for notarized_apology_requirement in 2B-5B.

proposal: Street signs say Walk and Don't Walk on the same pole. Fund a clarity audit or keep both valid.

options.label: Fund the clarity audit
options.result_text: Poles choose one instruction. Pedestrians walk with suspicious confidence.

options.label: Keep both instructions
options.result_text: Lawyers celebrate. Crosswalks become interpretive dance.

options.label: Add a third sign
options.result_text: New sign reads 'Interpret locally.' Tourism spikes briefly.

authoring.visual_hook: contradictory street signs with audit stickers
authoring.writer_notes: Genuinely useful outcome (clarity) at treasury cost; state-gated.

proposal: Ministries rename each other weekly. Create a Department of Renaming to stabilize the letterhead.

options.label: Create the department
options.result_text: Letterhead freezes for a quarter. Business cards become heirlooms.

options.label: Freeze all names one year
options.result_text: Signs stay. Creativity files for leave.

options.label: Allow weekly renames
options.result_text: Couriers deliver to yesterday's titles. Adventure classified as mail.

authoring.visual_hook: stacked ministry plaques being swapped
authoring.writer_notes: Department premise without form-about-forms; three options.

proposal: Human post is slow and expensive. Train pigeons for mail. Forms still required. Feathers optional.

options.label: Approve pigeon post
options.result_text: Mail arrives faster and in feathers. Budget lines smell like grain.

options.label: Hybrid human-pigeon routes
options.result_text: Humans carry forms. Pigeons carry excuses. Both clock in.

options.label: Keep human post only
options.result_text: Post workers celebrate. Pigeons file for unemployment stamps.

authoring.visual_hook: coops on post-office roof with form clipboards
authoring.writer_notes: REWRITE+reclassify from administration filler; serious treasury/order stakes.

proposal: Comrades need public baskets in every plaza. Soft power starts with soft landing.

options.label: Install plaza baskets
options.result_text: Baskets fill by noon. Bench space becomes negotiable territory.

options.label: Pilot one plaza
options.result_text: One plaza purrs. Neighbor plazas file solidarity petitions.

options.label: Deny the baskets
options.result_text: Hard pavement remains. Whiskers schedules a dignified glare.

authoring.visual_hook: woven baskets occupying civic plaza benches
authoring.writer_notes: Not automatically favorable; order/elite costs. Soft unlock palace pet (B).

proposal: Mice demand hunting permits for cats. Predators must apply. Diplomacy smells like cheese.

options.label: Pass mouse protection
options.result_text: Mice file permits. Cats file complaints about paperwork. Order wobbles.

options.label: Exempt registered hunters
options.result_text: Some cats wear badges. Mice memorize badge numbers.

options.label: Reject mouse petitions
options.result_text: Natural order resumes. Mice retreat to the walls with lawyers.

authoring.visual_hook: tiny permit booths for mice beside cat plazas
authoring.writer_notes: Serious political consequences; cats not always favored; state-gated.

proposal: Fish prices rise. Comrade Whiskers demands a market subsidy. Treasury will smell optimistic.

options.label: Fund the fish subsidy
options.result_text: Fish trucks arrive daily. Budget meetings move outdoors for air.

options.label: Token fish ration
options.result_text: One fish per registered paw. Lines form before dawn.

options.label: Refuse the subsidy
options.result_text: Markets stay free. Whiskers schedules a dignified hunger meeting.

authoring.visual_hook: fish trucks unloading at palace gates
authoring.writer_notes: Serious treasury consequences; not fish-currency chain premise.

proposal: Premium citizens want palace tours during working meetings. Charge for velvet ropes and whispered agendas.

options.label: Open working tours
options.result_text: Tourists photograph decrees mid-signature. Security invents quieter stamps.

options.label: Night tours only
options.result_text: Moonlit corridors sell out. Advisors bump into gift bags.

options.label: Keep the palace closed
options.result_text: Doors stay official. Profit invoices the missed revenue in triplicate.

authoring.visual_hook: velvet ropes through the working cabinet room
authoring.writer_notes: Consumes subscription soft flag; not gift-shop chain premise.

proposal: Endgame needs revenue. Lease thirty seconds of the anthem to a snack brand. Patriotism with crunch.

options.label: Lease the anthem read
options.result_text: Citizens sing about crackers. Maps stay the same. Branding does not.

options.label: Add a soft jingle only
options.result_text: A polite chime follows the last verse. Children hum logos.

options.label: Keep the anthem clean
options.result_text: Anthem remains unbranded. Profit calls it a branding tragedy.

authoring.visual_hook: snack banners under the flag during anthem
authoring.writer_notes: Non-privatization sponsorship; soft corporate_ministan identity flag.

proposal: Treasury proposes cookie futures: bet on next festival's biscuit yield. Spreadsheets smell delicious.

options.label: Open the futures desk
options.result_text: Traders shout crumb prices. Bakers refuse to be derivatives.

options.label: Pilot with palace cooks
options.result_text: Cooks hedge flour. The oven becomes a trading floor.

options.label: Ban cookie futures
options.result_text: Futures banned. Cookies return to being merely cookies.

authoring.visual_hook: chalk futures board covered in biscuit symbols
authoring.writer_notes: Non-obvious resources: order and happiness, not treasury-only.

proposal: Border queues embarrass the parade. Lease an express inspection lane to a private booth company.

options.label: Lease the express lane
options.result_text: Fast lane salutes for a fee. Slow lane invents longer forms.

options.label: Staff it with soldiers
options.result_text: Soldiers stamp passports with enthusiasm. Tourists stand straighter.

options.label: Keep one equal lane
options.result_text: Everyone waits together. Boom times the inefficiency aloud.

authoring.visual_hook: private booth beside military border post
authoring.writer_notes: Boom speaker diversity; private infrastructure at border.

proposal: Backlog exceeds shelves. Declare Emergency Efficiency Week. Stamp faster. Sleep optional.

options.label: Declare efficiency week
options.result_text: Backlog shrinks. Clerks gain eye bags and medals.

options.label: Hire temporary stampers
options.result_text: Temps stamp bravely. Half the stamps are upside down.

options.label: Ignore the backlog
options.result_text: Shelves lean. Clerk Zero files a complaint about gravity.

authoring.visual_hook: countdown timers over filing cabinets
authoring.writer_notes: Genuinely useful backlog clear at happiness/treasury cost.

proposal: Verbal apologies lack stamps. Require notarized apologies before forgiveness may proceed.

options.label: Require notarized apologies
options.result_text: Sorry now needs wax. Friendships schedule appointments.

options.label: Stamp optional for minor slights
options.result_text: Minor sorry remains free. Major sorry requires a queue.

options.label: Allow spoken apologies
options.result_text: People apologize immediately. Notaries look underemployed.

authoring.visual_hook: wax-seal apology desk
authoring.writer_notes: State-gated from complaint permit soft unlock.

proposal: Queues waste time. Auction priority numbers. Highest bid waits least. Spreadsheet approves.

options.label: Run queue auctions
options.result_text: Rich citizens skip ahead. Poor citizens invent longer books.

options.label: Lottery the numbers
options.result_text: Luck decides the line. Clerks shrug with forms.

options.label: Keep first-come order
options.result_text: Fairness remains. Penny notes the inefficiency in red ink.

authoring.visual_hook: auction paddles in a government queue hall
authoring.writer_notes: Bureaucracy with treasury economics; three options.

proposal: Dear, half the country owes unfinished forms. One midnight amnesty — or they stay guilty forever.

options.label: Grant midnight amnesty
options.result_text: Citizens file until dawn. Clerks invent new coffee.

options.label: Amnesty minor forms only
options.result_text: Small sins forgiven. Large sins get larger stamps.

options.label: No amnesty
options.result_text: Guilt remains filed. Olga brings soup to the queues anyway.

authoring.visual_hook: midnight lamps over a form-amnesty desk
authoring.writer_notes: Useful outcome path; soft government_by_form identity; Olga voice.

proposal: The palace needs an official pet with a cushion budget. Elites prefer something quieter than democracy.

options.label: Appoint a palace cat
options.result_text: Cushion installed. Ministers negotiate sitting rights.

options.label: Rotate weekly pets
options.result_text: Monday is cat. Thursday is confused pigeon. Protocol weeps.

options.label: Refuse an official pet
options.result_text: No cushion. Whiskers marks the palace Unfriendly.

authoring.visual_hook: throne-side cushion with name plaque
authoring.writer_notes: State-gated from baskets; elite clash; soft cat identity.

proposal: Dogs feel overlooked. Hold an Apology Festival — or let the cats keep winning the plazas.

options.label: Hold the dog festival
options.result_text: Dogs parade. Cats boycott the square with dignity.

options.label: Joint species picnic
options.result_text: Picnic happens. Someone steals the sausages. Peace holds briefly.

options.label: Skip the festival
options.result_text: No festival. Dogs sigh. Cats claim it was never needed.

authoring.visual_hook: dog banners opposite cat baskets
authoring.writer_notes: Species competition; Whiskers affinity risk on dog path.

proposal: Squirrels demand union recognition and park voting observers. Nuts are only the beginning.

options.label: Recognize the union
options.result_text: Squirrels elect a shop steward. Parks gain tiny picket signs.

options.label: Observer status only
options.result_text: Observers watch. They also bury ballots for winter.

options.label: Refuse recognition
options.result_text: Union denied. Acorns appear in unexpected desks.

authoring.visual_hook: tiny picket signs in the park canopy
authoring.writer_notes: Serious political consequences; three options; not cat-voting arc.

proposal: Endgame traffic ignores paws. Grant cats crosswalk priority — or admit the street belongs to boots.

options.label: Grant cat priority
options.result_text: Cars wait. Cats nap mid-stripe. Timetables become suggestions.

options.label: Add shared paw signals
options.result_text: New lights blink. Nobody agrees what the blink means.

options.label: Refuse cat priority
options.result_text: Boots keep the street. Whiskers files a traffic manifesto.

authoring.visual_hook: paw-print crosswalk paint
authoring.writer_notes: Cat public service with serious order cost; soft cat identity flag.
